message:
refactor(charmed): code formatting and test improvements across crates

Bubbletea Crate:
- Reformat simulator.rs with improved line breaks in while conditions
- Clean up test formatting with multi-line assert_eq! calls
- Improve Model trait impl formatting in tests (init, update, view methods)
- Reformat MouseModel and SizeModel test structs
- Fix import ordering (MouseAction, MouseButton, MouseMsg)

Demo Showcase:
- Add new dependency in Cargo.toml
- Improve app.rs structure and formatting
- Update config.rs with cleaner code organization
- Refine animation.rs data handling
- Clean up page implementations (dashboard, docs, files, jobs, logs, wizard)
- Enhance test_support.rs with additional test utilities
- Improve shell_action.rs formatting
- Update theme.rs configuration

Charmed Log:
- Reformat formatting_tests.rs for consistency

Glamour:
- Update ansi_verification_tests.rs formatting

Sync beads issue tracker and Cargo.lock.

These changes improve code readability and maintainability through
consistent formatting while adding new test infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
